intro: A lantern-strung merchant ship drifts alongside, its deck heaped with crates from a hundred distant ports. A sharp-eyed trader leans over the rail and beckons.
title: The Exotic Trader
description: A floating market of top-shelf goods, every piece rare and dear. Pay the steep boarding fee to browse a guaranteed high-tier selection, or sail on with your coin.

1.label: Board and browse ({{money, money}})
1.tooltip:
(+) A guaranteed high-tier selection (1 Rogue, 2 Ultra)
(-) A steep boarding fee
1.selected: You hand over the fee and step aboard to inspect the wares...

2.label: Sail on
2.selected: You wave the trader off and let the ship drift away.
